notes: Alfred Linux 7.77 — sovereign desktop from Debian Trixie with Linux kernel.org 7.0.1 tree, Omahon Seal, and the full Alfred hook stack. AKJV under /usr/share/alfred/bible/ with the image (not in vmlinux). Default AI path is local Omahon + Ollama only — no cloud API keys. First-boot TTS/he per README.
